units.source_text: The following disclosure provides a reconciliation by stage of the Group’s personal lending gross carrying/nominal amount and allowances for loans and advances to customers, including loan commitments and financial

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: In addition, three reconciliations by stage of the Group’s gross carrying/nominal amount and allowances for first lien mortgages, credit cards and other personal lending, including loan commitments and financial
units.translation_target_text: 此外，按阶段对集团总账面/名义金额和第一留置权抵押贷款、信用卡和其他个人贷款的备抵进行三项调节，包括贷款承诺和财务
units.translation_zh: 此外，按阶段对集团总账面/名义金额和第一留置权抵押贷款、信用卡和其他个人贷款的备抵进行三项调节，包括贷款承诺和财务

units.source_text: guarantees, have been included following the adoption of the recommendations of the DECL Taskforce’s third report in 2023.
